case_title: DESIREA MICHELLE CHATMAN VS. JOHNNY LEE CLARKE et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHATMAN, DESIREA MICHELLE AS TO DEFENDANT CLARKE, JOHNNY LEE , INDIVIDUALLY AND JOINTLY DBA INHERENT KNOWLEDGE CLARKE, CLEMENTINE , INDIVIDUALLY AND JOINTLY DBA INHERENT KNOWLEDGE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHATMAN, DESIREA MICHELLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CLARKE, JOHNNY LEE , INDIVIDUALLY AND JOINTLY DBA INHERENT KNOWLEDGE CLARKE, CLEMENTINE , INDIVIDUALLY AND JOINTLY DBA INHERENT KNOWLEDGE $5,909.12 PRINCIPAL, $20.51 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,109.63, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
